title: Release apply executor
description: Downloads the previously uploaded terraform plan bundle and applies it, through @pagopa/dx-tasks. Intended to be assigned to the nx-release-publish target of deployable Terraform environment projects.

dryRun.description: Whether to skip applying infrastructure and only preview the release

projectRoot.description: Terraform project root used as the module path

report.description: Whether to write a dx-tasks JSON report of the apply output

sensitiveKeys.description: Terraform output keys whose values must be redacted

verbose.description: Whether to print the full terraform apply output
